TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Afang Titay foksi == O sarakatay foksi no 'Amis ci Afang Titay foksi. So'elinay o satapangan no mitooray pisinting a likisi no 'Amis o nai laloma'an ni Afang Titay, o tato'asan ningra o nano Kavalan a finacadan. O mama ci Titay, o ina ci Lomaw, i 1887 miheca 8 folad 15 romi'ad masofoc i lawac paniyaro'an no Kalingko, mato'as i cifafahi to Sakizaya a fafahiyan ci Panayan. Kamatini no 'orip a mafiyol, mafana' to no 'Amis, Payrang, Dipong a sowal. I 'ayaw no pipaso'elin to Tapang itira sa cingra i niyaro' no Kaliyawan (ngata no hikokiciw no Kalingko). O "Ina no pitooran" - Ciwan Iwal i 1923 miheca ona pikerid no tingtosi no Kalingko kiwkay (Hualienkangh) ni Li Shuiche paso'olin, saka i 1924 miheca 6 folad 1 romi'ad o pililiw no foksi ni Liu Junchen a mapaino' itiya, mala o sarakatay mitooray no Truku cingra. I 1929 miheca kacanglahan o sinkiwsi ci Sun Yakop foksi (Rev. James Dickson) a pipa'icel tayra i Tansui fafahiyan a pitilidan mitilid. Kaitira ni Ciwang Iwal Tansui 8 folad kaitira ningra, nanoya maocor no ka'amisay Sintokay tayni i Kalingko, itira i Kaliyawan ko kahiceraan misitapang to itiraay i Sincen a Truku tamdaw mipatenak to ratoh. Latek o nika tayra ni Ciwang Iwal i Tansui minanam saka ranikay matongal klo mitooray, nanoya ka'amisay ciwkay mipatireng to Kaliyawan kasa'opoan. Oya ci Afang Titay foksi o naitiraay ko pinanam ningra to sowal, i 1930 miheca mipaino' cingra itiya. I 1931 miheca 4 folad, ci Afang Titay foksi pakayni pipa'icel ni Sun Yakop foksi saka, pa'acaen ningra ko dafong (halo saka'orip a kolong ato omah) itiya, lahakelong sato mararamod tayra i Tansui Oxford pitilidan-Taypi Sinkako (Taywan Sinkakoyin), mitilid to pitengil a sito. Midotoc to ni Sun Lilian (fafahi ni Son Yokop foksi) a wacay, saka tosa miheca tayni ci Afang Titay mararamod ni hawikidan a lalosidan caay pakafatad to lofoc saan, o kasini'adaan to nengnengen. Tolo miheca ko pinanam to sinkak malaheci to, itiya i 1934 miheca 4 folad ko pisawadan, itiya maocor no ka'amisay sintokay tayra i Fata'an mipatenak, sa'ayaw itira cingra i fiyaw no Taan kiwkay pahicera. Patireng cingra i ka'ayaw no isisiw itiya. Itira to ko kahiceraan ko kasa'opo no pipatenakan, misitapang to patenak a tayal. Ka Dipongan a to'ek mi'edesay to pipatenak to ratoh itiya, caay ka talaw ci Afang Titay to ka'edes no Dipong. Milimek to kanengnengan no Dipong, patama sa i kalingadan i omah a mipatenak, i pisimawan to adadaay i loma' itiya miliso' patenak to ratoh ni Kristo. Tolo miheca ko pipatenak a tayal, awaay ko kacihecian, dengan o pikerid ningra to tatosaay mapohaway, ci Sayi Putal aci Unak Cenol, ato cecay pa'epiay ci Mayaw Panong paso'elin to Tapang. Nikawrira, pakaynien no Kawas tonini masamo'ay a tamdaw ko sakalemed mapa'orip ko 'alomanay finawlan no 'Amis. O safa no mapohaway a Unak Cenol ci Linga (Zeng Yulan) mapatay to, o fa'inay ningra o sarakatay a tintosi no 'Amis ci Onak (Chen Zhifeng), o salikaka ningra paso'elin to ci Kristoan. 1938 miheca mapa'ayaw ni Afang Titay foksi, Kai Ruilian hakasi makerid patayra i Tansui Kristokiw fafahiyan pitilidan mitilid, misawad minokay tayni niyaro' midama ci Afang Titay foksi to tayal saki Kristokiw kiwiko. Tangasa 'ayaw no saka 2 kalaloodan no hekal, sa'etal no Fata'an niyaro ira ko mataelifay to 50 ko mitooray saan a matilid. O kasa'opo no mitooray malalang ko imeng no Dipong a mahimaw saka eca kanga'ay patenak saka, kilafiian sato ko kasa'opo miliyas to kafana'aw no Dipong, itira i loma' ni Linga ko kasa'opo minanam to sowal, nika ira ko matakopay no imeng masati' a paloen. O sapilaliw a milimek to katakopaw no imeng ci Afang Titay foksi, i 1944 miheca milaliw to Fata'an tayra i lotok no Molating (Wanning) niyaro' misimed. Tangasa i 1945 miheca paherekan no saka 2 lalood no hekal a masadak, nanoya maocor ci Afang Titay foksi i Tokar kiwkay a mipadang ko tayal itiya. Saan ci Afang Titay foksi to itiraay i Fata'an a mitooray, o kacelakan no hana no 'Amis finacadan wasa to Fata'an, masowal ko Fata'an "Irusalim no 'Amis" sa ko pipangangan. I 1953 miheca, o kalotay masamo' to ko tatirengan ni Afang Titay, nai Tokar kiwkay misawad nokay sato tayra i Cupo no Kalingko, i 1969 miheca 3 folad 7 romi'ad miliyas to hekal, ira ko 82 mihecaan itini i hekal. 'orip ni Afang Titay pakayni i sowal no Kawas ko nisa'icelan tangasa piliyaw to hekal, o kakangodoan no finawlan ato sini'ada no Kawas i cingraan, ira ko papinapina no Fata'an a salikaka patireng to piharatengan ci Afang Titay (Xu Nanmien) foksian, i 1981 mihecaan pisinting 50 miheca no 'Amis itiya patireng, o wiyinhuy no 'Amis ciwkay ci Namoh Rata ko mitiliday to piharatengan 'otoc. Pinengnengan to tilid 2. ‚ĒÄ "4:137-162.
S.PHON: == afaŇč titaj fo~uksi == o~u sarakataj fo~uksi no~u °amis ¶i afaŇč titaj fo~uksi. so~u °…ô…ĺinaj o~u satapaŇčan no~u mito~uo~uraj pisintiŇč a …ĺikisi no~u °amis o~u nai …ĺa…ĺo~uma °an ni afaŇč titaj, o~u tato~u °asan niŇčra o~u nano~u kab~va…ĺan a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan. o~u mama ¶i titaj, o~u ina ¶i …ĺo~umaw, i **** mińß…ô ¶a * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ ** ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ maso~ufo~u ¶ i …ĺawa ¶ panijaro~u °an no~u ka…ĺiŇčko~u, mato~u °as i ¶ifafańßi to~u saki*aja a fafańßijan ¶i panajan. kamatini no~u °o~urip a mafijo~u…ĺ, mafana ° to~u no~u °amis, pajraŇč, …¨~…ģipo~uŇč a so~uwa…ĺ. i °ajaw no~u pipaso~u °…ô…ĺin to~u tapaŇč itira sa ¶iŇčra i nijaro~u ° no~u ka…ĺijawan (Ňčata no~u ńßiko~uki ¶iw no~u ka…ĺiŇčko~u). o~u "ina no~u pito~uo~uran" - ¶iwan iwa…ĺ i **** mińß…ô ¶a o~una pik…ôri…¨~…ģ no~u tiŇčto~usi no~u ka…ĺiŇčko~u kiwkaj (ńßo~u~ua…ĺi…ônkaŇčńß) ni …ĺi sńßo~u~ui ¶ńß…ô paso~u °o~u…ĺin, saka i **** mińß…ô ¶a * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ * ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ o~u pi…ĺi…ĺiw no~u fo~uksi ni …ĺio~u~u *o~u~un ¶ńß…ôn a mapaino~u ° itija, ma…ĺa o~u sarakataj mito~uo~uraj no~u tro~u~uko~u~u ¶iŇčra. i **** mińß…ô ¶a ka ¶aŇč…ĺańßan o~u sinkiwsi ¶i so~u~un jako~up fo~uksi (r…ôb~v. *am…ôs …¨~…ģi ¶kso~un) a pipa °i ¶…ô…ĺ tajra i tanso~u~ui fafańßijan a piti…ĺi…¨~…ģan miti…ĺi…¨~…ģ. kaitira ni ¶iwaŇč iwa…ĺ tanso~u~ui * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ kaitira niŇčra, nano~uja mao~u ¶o~ur no~u ka °amisaj sinto~ukaj tajni i ka…ĺiŇčko~u, itira i ka…ĺijawan ko~u kańßi ¶…ôraan misitapaŇč to~u itiraaj i sin ¶…ôn a tro~u~uko~u~u tam…¨~…ģaw mipat…ônak to~u rato~uńß. …ĺat…ôk o~u nika tajra ni ¶iwaŇč iwa…ĺ i tanso~u~ui minanam saka ranikaj mato~uŇča…ĺ k…ĺo~u mito~uo~uraj, nano~uja ka °amisaj ¶iwkaj mipatir…ôŇč to~u ka…ĺijawan kasa °o~upo~uan. o~uja ¶i afaŇč titaj fo~uksi o~u naitiraaj ko~u pinanam niŇčra to~u so~uwa…ĺ, i **** mińß…ô ¶a mipaino~u ° ¶iŇčra itija. i **** mińß…ô ¶a * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ, ¶i afaŇč titaj fo~uksi pakajni pipa °i ¶…ô…ĺ ni so~u~un jako~up fo~uksi saka, pa °a ¶a…ôn niŇčra ko~u …¨~…ģafo~uŇč (ńßa…ĺo~u saka °o~urip a ko~u…ĺo~uŇč ato~u o~umańß) itija, …ĺańßak…ô…ĺo~uŇč sato~u mararamo~u…¨~…ģ tajra i tanso~u~ui o~uxfo~ur…¨~…ģ piti…ĺi…¨~…ģan-tajpi sinkako~u (tajwan sinkako~ujin), miti…ĺi…¨~…ģ to~u pit…ôŇči…ĺ a sito~u. mi…¨~…ģo~uto~u ¶ to~u ni so~u~un …ĺi…ĺian (fafańßi ni so~un jo~uko~up fo~uksi) a wa ¶aj, saka to~usa mińß…ô ¶a tajni ¶i afaŇč titaj mararamo~u…¨~…ģ ni ńßawiki…¨~…ģan a …ĺa…ĺo~usi…¨~…ģan ¶aaj pakafata…¨~…ģ to~u …ĺo~ufo~u ¶ saan, o~u kasini °a…¨~…ģaan to~u n…ôŇčn…ôŇč…ôn. to~u…ĺo~u mińß…ô ¶a ko~u pinanam to~u sinkak ma…ĺańß…ô ¶i to~u, itija i **** mińß…ô ¶a * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ ko~u pisawa…¨~…ģan, itija mao~u ¶o~ur no~u ka °amisaj sinto~ukaj tajra i fata °an mipat…ônak, sa °ajaw itira ¶iŇčra i fijaw no~u taan kiwkaj pańßi ¶…ôra. patir…ôŇč ¶iŇčra i ka °ajaw no~u isisiw itija. itira to~u ko~u kańßi ¶…ôraan ko~u kasa °o~upo~u no~u pipat…ônakan, misitapaŇč to~u pat…ônak a taja…ĺ. ka …¨~…ģipo~uŇčan a to~u °…ôk mi °…ô…¨~…ģ…ôsaj to~u pipat…ônak to~u rato~uńß itija, ¶aaj ka ta…ĺaw ¶i afaŇč titaj to~u ka °…ô…¨~…ģ…ôs no~u …¨~…ģipo~uŇč. mi…ĺim…ôk to~u kan…ôŇčn…ôŇčan no~u …¨~…ģipo~uŇč, patama sa i ka…ĺiŇča…¨~…ģan i o~umańß a mipat…ônak, i pisimawan to~u tato~usaaj mapo~uńßawaj, ¶i saji po~u~uta…ĺ a ¶i o~u~unak ¶…ôno~u…ĺ, ato~u ¶…ô ¶aj pa °…ôpiaj ¶i majaw pano~uŇč paso~u °…ô…ĺin to~u tapaŇč. nikawrira, pakajni…ôn no~u kawas to~unini masamo~u °aj a tam…¨~…ģaw ko~u saka…ĺ…ôm…ô…¨~…ģ mapa °o~urip ko~u °a…ĺo~umanaj finaw…ĺan no~u °amis. o~u safa no~u mapo~uńßawaj a o~u~unak ¶…ôno~u…ĺ ¶i …ĺiŇča (*…ôŇč jo~u~u…ĺan) mapataj to~u, o~u fa °inaj niŇčra o~u taŇčasa °ajaw no~u saka * ka…ĺa…ĺo~uo~u…¨~…ģan no~u ńß…ôka…ĺ, sa °…ôta…ĺ no~u fata °an nijaro~u ira ko~u mata…ô…ĺifaj to~u ** ko~u mito~uo~uraj saan a mati…ĺi…¨~…ģ. o~u kasa °o~upo~u no~u mito~uo~uraj ko~u kasa °o~upo~u minanam to~u so~uwa…ĺ, nika ira ko~u matako~upaj no~u im…ôŇč masati ° a pa…ĺo~u…ôn. o~u sapi…ĺa…ĺiw a mi…ĺim…ôk to~u katako~upaw no~u im…ôŇč ¶i afaŇč titaj fo~uksi, i **** mińß…ô ¶a mi…ĺa…ĺiw to~u fata °an tajra i …ĺo~uto~uk no~u mo~u…ĺatiŇč (wanniŇč) nijaro~u ° misim…ô…¨~…ģ. taŇčasa i **** mińß…ô ¶a pańß…ôr…ôkan no~u saka * …ĺa…ĺo~uo~u…¨~…ģ no~u ńß…ôka…ĺ a masa…¨~…ģak, nano~uja ¶a…¨~…ģan wasa to~u fata °an, maso~uwa…ĺ ko~u fata °an "iro~u~usa…ĺim no~u °amis" sa ko~u pipaŇčaŇčan. i **** mińß…ô ¶a, o~u ka…ĺo~utaj masamo~u ° to~u ko~u tatir…ôŇčan ni afaŇč titaj, nai to~ukar no~u fata °an a sa…ĺikaka patir…ôŇč to~u pińßarat…ôŇčan ¶i afaŇč titaj (xo~u~u nanmi…ôn) fo~uksian, i **** mińß…ô ¶aan pisintiŇč ** mińß…ô ¶a no~u °amis itija patir…ôŇč, o~u wijinńßo~u~uj no~u °amis ¶iwkaj ¶i namo~uńß rata ko~u miti…ĺi…¨~…ģaj to~u pińßarat…ôŇčan °o~uto~u ¶. pin…ôŇčn…ôŇčan to~u ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ *. * "*:***-***.
S.FORM: == Afang Titay foksi == O sarakatay foksi no 'Amis ci Afang Titay foksi. So'elinay o satapangan no mitooray pisinting a likisi no 'Amis o nai laloma'an ni Afang Titay, o tato'asan ningra o nano Kavalan a finacadan. O mama ci Titay, o ina ci Lomaw, i 1887 miheca 8 folad 15 romi'ad masofoc i lawac paniyaro'an no Kalingko, mato'as i cifafahi to Sakizaya a fafahiyan ci Panayan. Kamatini no 'orip a mafiyol, mafana' to no 'Amis, Payrang, Dipong a sowal. I 'ayaw no pipaso'elin to Tapang itira sa cingra i niyaro' no Kaliyawan (ngata no hikokiciw no Kalingko). O "Ina no pitooran" - Ciwan Iwal i 1923 miheca ona pikerid no tingtosi no Kalingko kiwkay (Hualienkangh) ni Li Shuiche paso'olin, saka i 1924 miheca 6 folad 1 romi'ad o pililiw no foksi ni Liu Junchen a mapaino' itiya, mala o sarakatay mitooray no Truku cingra. I 1929 miheca kacanglahan o sinkiwsi ci Sun Yakop foksi (Rev. James Dickson) a pipa'icel tayra i Tansui fafahiyan a pitilidan mitilid. Kaitira ni Ciwang Iwal Tansui 8 folad kaitira ningra, nanoya maocor no ka'amisay Sintokay tayni i Kalingko, itira i Kaliyawan ko kahiceraan misitapang to itiraay i Sincen a Truku tamdaw mipatenak to ratoh. Latek o nika tayra ni Ciwang Iwal i Tansui minanam saka ranikay matongal klo mitooray, nanoya ka'amisay ciwkay mipatireng to Kaliyawan kasa'opoan. Oya ci Afang Titay foksi o naitiraay ko pinanam ningra to sowal, i 1930 miheca mipaino' cingra itiya. I 1931 miheca 4 folad, ci Afang Titay foksi pakayni pipa'icel ni Sun Yakop foksi saka, pa'acaen ningra ko dafong (halo saka'orip a kolong ato omah) itiya, lahakelong sato mararamod tayra i Tansui Oxford pitilidan-Taypi Sinkako (Taywan Sinkakoyin), mitilid to pitengil a sito. Midotoc to ni Sun Lilian (fafahi ni Son Yokop foksi) a wacay, saka tosa miheca tayni ci Afang Titay mararamod ni hawikidan a lalosidan caay pakafatad to lofoc saan, o kasini'adaan to nengnengen. Tolo miheca ko pinanam to sinkak malaheci to, itiya i 1934 miheca 4 folad ko pisawadan, itiya maocor no ka'amisay sintokay tayra i Fata'an mipatenak, sa'ayaw itira cingra i fiyaw no Taan kiwkay pahicera. Patireng cingra i ka'ayaw no isisiw itiya. Itira to ko kahiceraan ko kasa'opo no pipatenakan, misitapang to patenak a tayal. Ka Dipongan a to'ek mi'edesay to pipatenak to ratoh itiya, caay ka talaw ci Afang Titay to ka'edes no Dipong. Milimek to kanengnengan no Dipong, patama sa i kalingadan i omah a mipatenak, i pisimawan to adadaay i loma' itiya miliso' patenak to ratoh ni Kristo. Tolo miheca ko pipatenak a tayal, awaay ko kacihecian, dengan o pikerid ningra to tatosaay mapohaway, ci Sayi Putal aci Unak Cenol, ato cecay pa'epiay ci Mayaw Panong paso'elin to Tapang. Nikawrira, pakaynien no Kawas tonini masamo'ay a tamdaw ko sakalemed mapa'orip ko 'alomanay finawlan no 'Amis. O safa no mapohaway a Unak Cenol ci Linga (Zeng Yulan) mapatay to, o fa'inay ningra o sarakatay a tintosi no 'Amis ci Onak (Chen Zhifeng), o salikaka ningra paso'elin to ci Kristoan. 1938 miheca mapa'ayaw ni Afang Titay foksi, Kai Ruilian hakasi makerid patayra i Tansui Kristokiw fafahiyan pitilidan mitilid, misawad minokay tayni niyaro' midama ci Afang Titay foksi to tayal saki Kristokiw kiwiko. Tangasa 'ayaw no saka 2 kalaloodan no hekal, sa'etal no Fata'an niyaro ira ko mataelifay to 50 ko mitooray saan a matilid. O kasa'opo no mitooray malalang ko imeng no Dipong a mahimaw saka eca kanga'ay patenak saka, kilafiian sato ko kasa'opo miliyas to kafana'aw no Dipong, itira i loma' ni Linga ko kasa'opo minanam to sowal, nika ira ko matakopay no imeng masati' a paloen. O sapilaliw a milimek to katakopaw no imeng ci Afang Titay foksi, i 1944 miheca milaliw to Fata'an tayra i lotok no Molating (Wanning) niyaro' misimed. Tangasa i 1945 miheca paherekan no saka 2 lalood no hekal a masadak, nanoya maocor ci Afang Titay foksi i Tokar kiwkay a mipadang ko tayal itiya. Saan ci Afang Titay foksi to itiraay i Fata'an a mitooray, o kacelakan no hana no 'Amis finacadan wasa to Fata'an, masowal ko Fata'an "Irusalim no 'Amis" sa ko pipangangan. I 1953 miheca, o kalotay masamo' to ko tatirengan ni Afang Titay, nai Tokar kiwkay misawad nokay sato tayra i Cupo no Kalingko, i 1969 miheca 3 folad 7 romi'ad miliyas to hekal, ira ko 82 mihecaan itini i hekal. 'orip ni Afang Titay pakayni i sowal no Kawas ko nisa'icelan tangasa piliyaw to hekal, o kakangodoan no finawlan ato sini'ada no Kawas i cingraan, ira ko papinapina no Fata'an a salikaka patireng to piharatengan ci Afang Titay (Xu Nanmien) foksian, i 1981 mihecaan pisinting 50 miheca no 'Amis itiya patireng, o wiyinhuy no 'Amis ciwkay ci Namoh Rata ko mitiliday to piharatengan 'otoc. Pinengnengan to tilid 2. ‚ĒÄ "4:137-162.
S.PHON: == afaŇč titaj fo~uksi == o~u sarakataj fo~uksi no~u °amis ¶i afaŇč titaj fo~uksi. so~u °…ô…ĺinaj o~u satapaŇčan no~u mito~uo~uraj pisintiŇč a …ĺikisi no~u °amis o~u nai …ĺa…ĺo~uma °an ni afaŇč titaj, o~u tato~u °asan niŇčra o~u nano~u kab~va…ĺan a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan. o~u mama ¶i titaj, o~u ina ¶i …ĺo~umaw, i **** mińß…ô ¶a * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ ** ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ maso~ufo~u ¶ i …ĺawa ¶ panijaro~u °an no~u ka…ĺiŇčko~u, mato~u °as i ¶ifafańßi to~u saki*aja a fafańßijan ¶i panajan. kamatini no~u °o~urip a mafijo~u…ĺ, mafana ° to~u no~u °amis, pajraŇč, …¨~…ģipo~uŇč a so~uwa…ĺ. i °ajaw no~u pipaso~u °…ô…ĺin to~u tapaŇč itira sa ¶iŇčra i nijaro~u ° no~u ka…ĺijawan (Ňčata no~u ńßiko~uki ¶iw no~u ka…ĺiŇčko~u). o~u "ina no~u pito~uo~uran" - ¶iwan iwa…ĺ i **** mińß…ô ¶a o~una pik…ôri…¨~…ģ no~u tiŇčto~usi no~u ka…ĺiŇčko~u kiwkaj (ńßo~u~ua…ĺi…ônkaŇčńß) ni …ĺi sńßo~u~ui ¶ńß…ô paso~u °o~u…ĺin, saka i **** mińß…ô ¶a * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ * ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ o~u pi…ĺi…ĺiw no~u fo~uksi ni …ĺio~u~u *o~u~un ¶ńß…ôn a mapaino~u ° itija, ma…ĺa o~u sarakataj mito~uo~uraj no~u tro~u~uko~u~u ¶iŇčra. i **** mińß…ô ¶a ka ¶aŇč…ĺańßan o~u sinkiwsi ¶i so~u~un jako~up fo~uksi (r…ôb~v. *am…ôs …¨~…ģi ¶kso~un) a pipa °i ¶…ô…ĺ tajra i tanso~u~ui fafańßijan a piti…ĺi…¨~…ģan miti…ĺi…¨~…ģ. kaitira ni ¶iwaŇč iwa…ĺ tanso~u~ui * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ kaitira niŇčra, nano~uja mao~u ¶o~ur no~u ka °amisaj sinto~ukaj tajni i ka…ĺiŇčko~u, itira i ka…ĺijawan ko~u kańßi ¶…ôraan misitapaŇč to~u itiraaj i sin ¶…ôn a tro~u~uko~u~u tam…¨~…ģaw mipat…ônak to~u rato~uńß. …ĺat…ôk o~u nika tajra ni ¶iwaŇč iwa…ĺ i tanso~u~ui minanam saka ranikaj mato~uŇča…ĺ k…ĺo~u mito~uo~uraj, nano~uja ka °amisaj ¶iwkaj mipatir…ôŇč to~u ka…ĺijawan kasa °o~upo~uan. o~uja ¶i afaŇč titaj fo~uksi o~u naitiraaj ko~u pinanam niŇčra to~u so~uwa…ĺ, i **** mińß…ô ¶a mipaino~u ° ¶iŇčra itija. i **** mińß…ô ¶a * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ, ¶i afaŇč titaj fo~uksi pakajni pipa °i ¶…ô…ĺ ni so~u~un jako~up fo~uksi saka, pa °a ¶a…ôn niŇčra ko~u …¨~…ģafo~uŇč (ńßa…ĺo~u saka °o~urip a ko~u…ĺo~uŇč ato~u o~umańß) itija, …ĺańßak…ô…ĺo~uŇč sato~u mararamo~u…¨~…ģ tajra i tanso~u~ui o~uxfo~ur…¨~…ģ piti…ĺi…¨~…ģan-tajpi sinkako~u (tajwan sinkako~ujin), miti…ĺi…¨~…ģ to~u pit…ôŇči…ĺ a sito~u. mi…¨~…ģo~uto~u ¶ to~u ni so~u~un …ĺi…ĺian (fafańßi ni so~un jo~uko~up fo~uksi) a wa ¶aj, saka to~usa mińß…ô ¶a tajni ¶i afaŇč titaj mararamo~u…¨~…ģ ni ńßawiki…¨~…ģan a …ĺa…ĺo~usi…¨~…ģan ¶aaj pakafata…¨~…ģ to~u …ĺo~ufo~u ¶ saan, o~u kasini °a…¨~…ģaan to~u n…ôŇčn…ôŇč…ôn. to~u…ĺo~u mińß…ô ¶a ko~u pinanam to~u sinkak ma…ĺańß…ô ¶i to~u, itija i **** mińß…ô ¶a * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ ko~u pisawa…¨~…ģan, itija mao~u ¶o~ur no~u ka °amisaj sinto~ukaj tajra i fata °an mipat…ônak, sa °ajaw itira ¶iŇčra i fijaw no~u taan kiwkaj pańßi ¶…ôra. patir…ôŇč ¶iŇčra i ka °ajaw no~u isisiw itija. itira to~u ko~u kańßi ¶…ôraan ko~u kasa °o~upo~u no~u pipat…ônakan, misitapaŇč to~u pat…ônak a taja…ĺ. ka …¨~…ģipo~uŇčan a to~u °…ôk mi °…ô…¨~…ģ…ôsaj to~u pipat…ônak to~u rato~uńß itija, ¶aaj ka ta…ĺaw ¶i afaŇč titaj to~u ka °…ô…¨~…ģ…ôs no~u …¨~…ģipo~uŇč. mi…ĺim…ôk to~u kan…ôŇčn…ôŇčan no~u …¨~…ģipo~uŇč, patama sa i ka…ĺiŇča…¨~…ģan i o~umańß a mipat…ônak, i pisimawan to~u a…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģaaj i …ĺo~uma ° itija mi…ĺiso~u ° pat…ônak to~u rato~uńß ni kristo~u. to~u…ĺo~u mińß…ô ¶a ko~u pipat…ônak a taja…ĺ, awaaj ko~u ka ¶ińß…ô ¶ian, …¨~…ģ…ôŇčan o~u pik…ôri…¨~…ģ niŇčra to~u tato~usaaj mapo~uńßawaj, ¶i saji po~u~uta…ĺ a ¶i o~u~unak ¶…ôno~u…ĺ, ato~u ¶…ô ¶aj pa °…ôpiaj ¶i majaw pano~uŇč paso~u °…ô…ĺin to~u tapaŇč. nikawrira, pakajni…ôn no~u kawas to~unini masamo~u °aj a tam…¨~…ģaw ko~u saka…ĺ…ôm…ô…¨~…ģ mapa °o~urip ko~u °a…ĺo~umanaj finaw…ĺan no~u °amis. o~u safa no~u mapo~uńßawaj a o~u~unak ¶…ôno~u…ĺ ¶i …ĺiŇča (*…ôŇč jo~u~u…ĺan) mapataj to~u, o~u fa °inaj niŇčra o~u sarakataj a tinto~usi no~u °amis ¶i o~unak ( ¶ńß…ôn *ńßif…ôŇč), o~u sa…ĺikaka niŇčra paso~u °…ô…ĺin to~u ¶i kristo~uan. **** mińß…ô ¶a mapa °ajaw ni afaŇč titaj fo~uksi, kai ro~u~ui…ĺian ńßakasi mak…ôri…¨~…ģ patajra i tanso~u~ui kristo~ukiw fafańßijan piti…ĺi…¨~…ģan miti…ĺi…¨~…ģ, misawa…¨~…ģ mino~ukaj tajni nijaro~u ° mi…¨~…ģama ¶i afaŇč titaj fo~uksi to~u taja…ĺ saki kristo~ukiw kiwiko~u. taŇčasa °ajaw no~u saka * ka…ĺa…ĺo~uo~u…¨~…ģan no~u ńß…ôka…ĺ, sa °…ôta…ĺ no~u fata °an nijaro~u ira ko~u mata…ô…ĺifaj to~u ** ko~u mito~uo~uraj saan a mati…ĺi…¨~…ģ. o~u kasa °o~upo~u no~u mito~uo~uraj ma…ĺa…ĺaŇč ko~u im…ôŇč no~u …¨~…ģipo~uŇč a mańßimaw saka …ô ¶a kaŇča °aj pat…ônak saka, ki…ĺafiian sato~u ko~u kasa °o~upo~u mi…ĺijas to~u kafana °aw no~u …¨~…ģipo~uŇč, itira i …ĺo~uma ° ni …ĺiŇča ko~u kasa °o~upo~u minanam to~u so~uwa…ĺ, nika ira ko~u matako~upaj no~u im…ôŇč masati ° a pa…ĺo~u…ôn. o~u sapi…ĺa…ĺiw a mi…ĺim…ôk to~u katako~upaw no~u im…ôŇč ¶i afaŇč titaj fo~uksi, i **** mińß…ô ¶a mi…ĺa…ĺiw to~u fata °an tajra i …ĺo~uto~uk no~u mo~u…ĺatiŇč (wanniŇč) nijaro~u ° misim…ô…¨~…ģ. taŇčasa i **** mińß…ô ¶a pańß…ôr…ôkan no~u saka * …ĺa…ĺo~uo~u…¨~…ģ no~u ńß…ôka…ĺ a masa…¨~…ģak, nano~uja mao~u ¶o~ur ¶i afaŇč titaj fo~uksi i to~ukar kiwkaj a mipa…¨~…ģaŇč ko~u taja…ĺ itija. saan ¶i afaŇč titaj fo~uksi to~u itiraaj i fata °an a mito~uo~uraj, o~u ka ¶…ô…ĺakan no~u ńßana no~u °amis fina ¶a…¨~…ģan wasa to~u fata °an, maso~uwa…ĺ ko~u fata °an "iro~u~usa…ĺim no~u °amis" sa ko~u pipaŇčaŇčan. i **** mińß…ô ¶a, o~u ka…ĺo~utaj masamo~u ° to~u ko~u tatir…ôŇčan ni afaŇč titaj, nai to~ukar kiwkaj misawa…¨~…ģ no~ukaj sato~u tajra i ¶o~u~upo~u no~u ka…ĺiŇčko~u, i **** mińß…ô ¶a * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ * ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ mi…ĺijas to~u ńß…ôka…ĺ, ira ko~u ** mińß…ô ¶aan itini i ńß…ôka…ĺ. °o~urip ni afaŇč titaj pakajni i so~uwa…ĺ no~u kawas ko~u nisa °i ¶…ô…ĺan taŇčasa pi…ĺijaw to~u ńß…ôka…ĺ, o~u kakaŇčo~u…¨~…ģo~uan no~u finaw…ĺan ato~u sini °a…¨~…ģa no~u kawas i ¶iŇčraan, ira ko~u papinapina no~u fata °an a sa…ĺikaka patir…ôŇč to~u pińßarat…ôŇčan ¶i afaŇč titaj (xo~u~u nanmi…ôn) fo~uksian, i **** mińß…ô ¶aan pisintiŇč ** mińß…ô ¶a no~u °amis itija patir…ôŇč, o~u wijinńßo~u~uj no~u °amis ¶iwkaj ¶i namo~uńß rata ko~u miti…ĺi…¨~…ģaj to~u pińßarat…ôŇčan °o~uto~u ¶. pin…ôŇčn…ôŇčan to~u ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ *. * "*:***-***.
